name: Mythos Advanced Reasoning
description: Frontier-tier reasoning capability exclusive to Claude Mythos Preview. Represents the upper bound of current AI reasoning -- complex multi-domain synthesis, adversarial robustness, and metacognitive self-correction at a level not yet publicly available.

transferArtifact.notes: Non-transferable via prompt engineering. This essence is model-specific to Claude Mythos Preview. A partial approximation can be achieved by co-equipping deep-reasoning + metacognitive-eval, but the mythic-tier capability requires the source model.
